overall.description: A third-person game engine scene featuring a female character in a vast, minimalist snow-covered coastal landscape. The character stands still initially, then walks steadily forward across the flat white terrain toward distant mountains, with a calm ocean visible to the left under a clear blue sky. On-screen UI prompts indicate this is interactive game footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast open snow field along a coastline

agents.ego_description: standing still at the edge of a vast snow field, facing the open landscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: flat white snow-covered ground stretching to the horizon in all directions
calm blue ocean visible along the left side of the frame meeting the snow at the shoreline
snow-capped mountains visible on the distant horizon beneath the clear sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a vast, empty snow-covered landscape under a clear blue sky. The character stands still at the edge of a flat white terrain with a calm ocean visible to the left and distant mountains ahead. The environment is serene and minimalist, with no vegetation or structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast open snow field along a coastline

events.description: character transitions from standing still to walking forward across the snow field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward across the flat snow-covered terrain toward the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking steadily forward across the endless snow field. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves toward the distant mountains. The ocean remains visible to the left, and the uniform white terrain continues with no new elements entering the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a minimalist, snow-covered coastal expanse that shifts from a moment of stillness to a steady forward progression. It begins with the character standing motionless at the edge of a flat white terrain, framed by a calm ocean to the left and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. As the character begins to move, the camera follows smoothly from behind, transitioning the scene from a static vista into a rhythmic journey across the endless snow field. The environment remains serene and uniform, with the distant peaks growing slightly more prominent as the character advances steadily through the empty landscape.
